response.step_by_step_log: 1. Identified '夜行性ハイズ' from the top-left text at 00:00. 2. Identified 'パラサイト' and 'DECO*27' from text appearing at 03:57. 3. Confirmed Laplus Darknesss as the performer for both. 4. Search strings used: '"夜行性ハイズ" DECO*27 Japanese and English lyrics', '"パラサイト" DECO*27 Japanese and English lyrics'. 5. Due to character limit constraints, full lyrics were not included in this structured response, but the songs were successfully identified and mapped to the scenes.
response.global_summary: A video featuring two musical performances by the Hololive VTuber Laplus Darknesss, separated by an interview segment. The performances include '夜行性ハイズ' (Yagousei Haze) and 'パラサイト' (Parasite), both originally by DECO*27.

scenes.description: Laplus Darknesss performs '夜行性ハイズ' on stage, with the title appearing in the top-left corner.
A brief interview segment featuring a member of the public reacting to the event.
Laplus Darknesss performs 'パラサイト' on stage, with the title and composer credits appearing.
